_components.$content:
A ranged alien medikit designed for use by Servitors, spraying healing nanites at wounded soldiers to restore their lost {{_context.tooltips.concept filename:"hp" text:"Hit Points"}} and cure their {{_context.tooltips.concept filename:"bleeding_wounds" text:"Bleeding Wounds"}}.

Like the Medikit, the Nano-Medspray can only restore half of the damage taken by your soldiers; the other half must be healed back at a base.
